# AxiomFolio handoff (retired)

> Retired on 2026-04-23 as part of Track M.4. AxiomFolio was migrated
> into the Paperwork monorepo; "handoff to partner" framing is no longer
> meaningful. The previous contents had drifted significantly from code
> (wrong endpoint paths, wrong tier numbers, non-existent tools) and
> were a net negative for new contributors.

See instead:

* **Brain/AxiomFolio contract:** [`AXIOMFOLIO_INTEGRATION.generated.md`](AXIOMFOLIO_INTEGRATION.generated.md) — auto-generated from [`axiomfolio/brain/axiomfolio_tools.yaml`](axiomfolio/brain/axiomfolio_tools.yaml).
* **Brain architecture:** [`BRAIN_ARCHITECTURE.md`](BRAIN_ARCHITECTURE.md).
* **Persona registry:** [`BRAIN_PERSONAS.md`](BRAIN_PERSONAS.md) (auto-generated footer).
* **Operational runbooks:** [`INFRA.md`](INFRA.md).
